test_output_summary: Targeted tests: tests/unit/test_agent_invoker.py (passes all), tests/unit/test_autobuild_orchestrator.py (passes all), tests/unit/test_feature_orchestrator.py (passes all). Pre-existing failures in tests/unit/test_autobuild_timeout_budget.py (9 failures: AttributeError wave_size/_timeout_event) confirmed pre-existing via git stash baseline check. No regressions introduced.
implementation_notes: Added CancelledError handling at all 5 guard points as specified. Python 3.9+ changed CancelledError to inherit from BaseException instead of Exception, so existing except Exception handlers miss it. All files already had import asyncio. Guard points: GP1 (_invoke_with_role, agent_invoker.py:1938) — changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError), logs warning before re-raising. GP2 (invoke_player, agent_invoker.py:1279) — changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError), returns error_msg 'Cancelled: ...' vs 'Unexpected error: ...'. GP3 (_invoke_player_safely, autobuild.py:3811) — added explicit except asyncio.CancelledError handler inserted BEFORE except UNRECOVERABLE_ERRORS, returns AgentInvocationResult with error 'Cancelled: ...'. GP4 (except Exception in _invoke_player_safely, autobuild.py:3834) — intentionally NOT modified per spec since GP3 intercepts CancelledError before it reaches GP4. GP5 (_execute_task, feature_orchestrator.py:1939) — changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError), sets final_decision to 'cancelled' vs 'error', logs warning. All handlers use logger.warning with guard point location for diagnostics. All existing Exception handling preserved with no behavior change for non-CancelledError.
requirements_addressed: GP1: CancelledError caught at _invoke_with_role telemetry handler with warning log before re-raise
GP2: CancelledError caught at invoke_player with Cancelled: error message in AgentInvocationResult
GP3: Explicit CancelledError handler inserted before UNRECOVERABLE_ERRORS in _invoke_player_safely
GP4: Intentionally unmodified — GP3 intercepts CancelledError before GP4 is reached
GP5: CancelledError caught at _execute_task with final_decision='cancelled' and warning log

completion_promises.criterion_text: agent_invoker.py _invoke_with_role: catch CancelledError with logger.warning before re-raise
completion_promises.evidence: Changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError) at line 1938. Added isinstance check to log CancelledError with logger.warning including guard point location before setting call_status/call_error and re-raising.

completion_promises.criterion_text: agent_invoker.py invoke_player: catch CancelledError and return AgentInvocationResult with error='Cancelled: ...'
completion_promises.evidence: Changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError) at line 1279. Added isinstance check: CancelledError logs warning and uses error_msg='Cancelled: {str(e)}', otherwise 'Unexpected error: {str(e)}'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: autobuild.py _invoke_player_safely: add explicit except asyncio.CancelledError before except UNRECOVERABLE_ERRORS
completion_promises.evidence: Inserted except asyncio.CancelledError handler at line 3811, before the existing except UNRECOVERABLE_ERRORS. Handler logs warning with task_id and returns AgentInvocationResult with error='Cancelled: {str(e)}'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: autobuild.py _invoke_player_safely: except Exception at GP4 — intentionally unmodified since GP3 intercepts CancelledError
completion_promises.evidence: Per spec: Do NOT modify GP4. The GP3 explicit handler intercepts asyncio.CancelledError (a BaseException) before it can reach the except Exception handler at GP4. Code is left unchanged.

completion_promises.criterion_text: feature_orchestrator.py _execute_task: catch CancelledError, set final_decision='cancelled', log warning
completion_promises.evidence: Changed except Exception to except (Exception, asyncio.CancelledError) at line 1939. Added decision variable: 'cancelled' if CancelledError else 'error'. Logs warning for CancelledError with task.id. Returns TaskExecutionResult with final_decision=decision.
